prompt: A ground-truth label map of a kitchen, marking distinct regions for appliances, countertops, cabinets, floor, and utensils.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics image depicting a kitchen as a ground-truth label map. Clearly segment and color distinct regions for appliances, countertops, cabinets, the floor, and utensils, using unique, solid colors for each category.
objects: Segmented region for the kitchen floor
Unique solid color for the appliance region
Unique solid color for the countertop region
Unique solid color for the cabinet region
Unique solid color for the floor region
Unique solid color for the utensil region
